title: Resource Pack Organizer
description: Enhances the Resource Pack menu by adding folder support for easier pack organization, ability to search packs by name or description, new sorting options, and quick refresh button directly in the GUI. Supports Forge & Fabric.
body:
Resource Pack Organizer overhauls the Resource Pack screen to give you finer control and a couple new quality-of-life features. It supports the **Forge** and **Fabric** mod loaders.

- **Organize resource pack into folders** that you can navigate from within the game
- Choose between folder view (navigate in and out of folders) and flat view (packs from all folders shown in a single list)
- Search pack names and description (supports the * wildcard)
- Sort packs and folders alphabetically A-Z or Z-A
- Option to display a list of active packs on your screen (configurable position and color; Forge only)
- Hold Alt when clicking 'Resource Packs...' button to show the vanilla screen instead (it will still show packs from all folders like with flat view)
- Stop Minecraft from removing incompatible packs after each restart

Follow [@chylexmc](https://twitter.com/chylexmc/) for development news and updates.

## Installation
The mod supports both **Forge** and **Fabric** since Minecraft 1.15.2. Any older versions only support **Forge**.

### Forge
Download and install [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/).
Download the [mod file](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-pack-organizer/versions) for your version, and place it into **.minecraft/mods**.

### Fabric
Download and install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/install) 0.6.4 or newer (you do not need to install the Fabric API).
Download the [mod file](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-pack-organizer/versions) for your version, and place it into **.minecraft/mods**.
